allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees give formal-reasoning an explicit branch structure so hidden forks in the argument are visible instead of being smuggled through prose.
allies.source_quote: Decision trees and logic structures help reason through alternatives explicitly.

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking strengthens formal-reasoning by forcing premises and inference steps to earn trust rather than merely look clean.
allies.source_quote: formal rigor requires disciplined challenge of assumptions

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking keeps formal-reasoning from becoming too linear by testing whether the cleaned-up logic still matches the structure of the real system.
allies.source_quote: reasoning structure must still track the real dynamics of the problem

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns formal-reasoning into a laundering machine when logic is used to defend a favored thesis instead of to test whether it actually follows.
antagonists.source_quote: formal logic fails when it is recruited to justify a desired conclusion

antagonists.rationale_text: Representativeness-heuristic competes with formal-reasoning by substituting intuitive pattern fit for valid logical structure — fast associative matching displaces the requirement that premises and inference steps actually connect.
antagonists.source_quote: formal-reasoning vs representativeness-heuristic: formal-reasoning conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when intuitive fit overrides valid inference structure.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Formal-reasoning conflicts with confirmation-bias when explicit premises and inference checks are replaced by a logic-shaped defense of the conclusion already preferred.

Formal-reasoning conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when intuitive fit overrides valid inference structure — a case feels logically resolved because it resembles a familiar category, not because the inference chain holds.
structured_tensions.source_quote: formal-reasoning vs representativeness-heuristic: formal-reasoning conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when intuitive fit overrides valid inference structure.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on decision structure, premise discipline, and explicit conflicts with confirmation-bias and representativeness-heuristic.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the source-backed logic, systems, and anti-confirmation neighborhood.
